name: Egg Foo Yung - Gwhp32a
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs well.
2. Add drained bean sprouts to the beaten eggs.
3. If using fresh sprouts, blanch them by placing in a covered skillet with a few teaspoons of water for just a few minutes.
4. Add bean sprouts, onions, salt, pepper, and crab meat (or shrimp) to the eggs.
5. Cook like pancakes in a small amount of oil.
6. To make the sauce, mix all the sauce ingredients together and cook until thickened.
7. Serve over Egg Foo Young.
